title: Plant/Crop Growth Accelerator
description: Increase plant or crops growth speed.
body:
# DESCRIPTION
Growth Accelerator adds different tiers of blocks that increase plant/crop growth speed. - Increase growth speed of plants/crops. - Some emits light. - Good for decoration.

## To use, **_put the growth accelerator block underneath a farmland or a block_** where you plant your crops or saplings. _See recipe in picture or use JEI._ #
Your support is very much appreciated 😊 [![Donate via Ko-fi](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9fzfevkxtje7qus10kfb2/400-63-kofi_button_red-2.png?rlkey=neocwsdasxcn8syd6xvybldgp&st=6uwwgv4n&raw=1)](https://ko-fi.com/sorasetsuna) #
Can I use this in my modpack? - Yes, you may.
